lip.name: Hotbar reveal area height
lip.hint: Sets the height of the bottom screen area that reveals the hidden hotbar when hovered.

hideDelay.name: Hotbar hide delay (ms)
hideDelay.hint: How many milliseconds the hotbar should remain visible after the mouse leaves it when it is not pinned. 2000 ms = 2 seconds.

hideMuteButton.name: Hide the “Mute Volume” button
hideMuteButton.hint: Hides the “Mute Volume” button from the hotbar.

pinInMuteSlot.name: Place the hotbar pin button in the “Mute Volume” button slot
pinInMuteSlot.hint: Moves the hotbar pin button into the “Mute Volume” button slot. This option only works when hotbar autohide and hiding the “Mute Volume” button are both enabled.

dockAtBottom.name: Hotbar at the bottom edge
dockAtBottom.hint: Moves the hotbar from Foundry's default position to the very bottom of the screen. Useful if you use the Camera Dock module.
